tasks.label: Train Go2 Tracking
args: source /home/yjiang/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate env_isaaclab && /home/yjiang/Documents/Robotics/IsaacLab/isaaclab.sh -p scripts/rsl_rl/train.py --task Tracking-Flat-Go2-No-State-Estimation-v0 --registry_name jiangyidong9343-university-of-wisconsin-madison-org/wandb-registry-motions/go2_sideflip_right_fps50 --num_envs ${input:trainNumEnvs} --max_iterations ${input:trainMaxIterations} --headless --logger wandb --log_project_name go2_tracking --run_name ${input:trainRunName}

tasks.label: Play Go2 Checkpoint
args: source /home/yjiang/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate env_isaaclab && /home/yjiang/Documents/Robotics/IsaacLab/isaaclab.sh -p scripts/rsl_rl/play.py --task Tracking-Flat-Go2-No-State-Estimation-v0 --load_run ${input:loadRun} --checkpoint ${input:checkpointName} --motion_file ${workspaceFolder}/artifacts/go2_sideflip_right_fps50:v0/motion.npz --num_envs ${input:playNumEnvs}

tasks.label: Measure Go2 Checkpoint Height
args: source /home/yjiang/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh && conda activate env_isaaclab && /home/yjiang/Documents/Robotics/IsaacLab/isaaclab.sh -p scripts/rsl_rl/measure_base_height.py --task Tracking-Flat-Go2-No-State-Estimation-v0 --load_run ${input:loadRun} --checkpoint ${input:checkpointName} --motion_file ${workspaceFolder}/artifacts/go2_sideflip_right_fps50:v0/motion.npz --num_envs ${input:measureNumEnvs} --headless

inputs.description: number of environments for measuring base height
